name: prime-whatsapp
description: AI-powered WhatsApp assistant with long-term memory using Baileys, Firebase, and Gemini

scripts.start:bg: node src/index.js > bot.log 2>&1 & echo $! > bot.pid && echo 'Bot started in background. Use npm run stop to kill.'
scripts.stop: kill $(cat bot.pid 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; rm -f bot.pid; echo 'Bot stopped.'
